api_key.description: Freshchat API key. Sent as Authorization: Bearer <api_key>; never logged.

base_url.description: Freshchat API base URL, e.g. https://<account_name>.freshchat.com/v2. This bundle requires the full base URL directly: legacy derives it from an account_name config value (https://<account_name>.freshchat.com/v2), but that cross-key derivation has no engine mechanism today (see docs.md Known limits) — spec.json's default materialization only supports a fixed literal, never one derived from another config value.

user_id.description: Freshchat user id for user_details and user_conversations streams.

conversation_id.description: Freshchat conversation id for conversation_detail and conversation_messages streams.

outbound_request_id.description: Optional request id filter for outbound_messages.

metrics_metric.description: Metric name for Freshchat historical_metrics and instant_metrics streams.

metrics_aggregator.description: Optional historical metrics aggregator query value.

metrics_interval.description: Optional historical metrics interval query value.

metrics_summary.description: Optional instant metrics summary query value.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
